title: Suspicious Service / Scheduled-Task Persistence
description: Detects suspicious Windows service (4697) or scheduled task (4698) creation pointing to LOLBINs or temp/appdata paths.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4697%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4698%') AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
